title: lucuma sericea
intro: Lucuma sericea, also known as the soft lucuma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lucuma sericea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Lucuma sericea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used as a flavoring agent in traditional Andean medicine.
